query: Alternative Data in Credit Underwriting: Rent Payment History and Telecom Data

ground_truth.title: Alternative Data in Credit Underwriting: Rent Payment History and Telecom Data
ground_truth.abstract: Using a panel of 2 million US consumers, we estimate the incremental predictive value of rent payment and telecom data for credit scoring thin-file borrowers, with implications for financial inclusion.
